assertions.assertion: Replaces ICache<T> with HybridCache from Microsoft.Extensions.Caching.Hybrid
assertions.rationale: ICache<T> to HybridCache is a Duende v8-specific migration; without the docs an LLM would not know this.
The specific keyed service name is entirely Duende v8-specific internal detail.

assertions.assertion: Uses GetOrCreateAsync (not GetOrAddAsync) for the cache retrieval pattern
assertions.rationale: The method rename from GetOrAddAsync to GetOrCreateAsync is HybridCache-specific API knowledge.
This is a Duende v8-specific deprecation not in general knowledge.
